description.en: Property owners (often homeowners renting spare rooms; increasingly professional short-term-let operators). Receive nightly rate minus a ~3% host service fee, paid 24 hours after guest check-in. AirCover provides up to $3M property-damage protection. Superhost programme rewards consistent quality with badge + search-ranking boost.
description.zh: 房产所有者(早期多为出租闲置房间的业主,后期逐渐专业化的短租运营商)。收到每晚租金扣除约 3% 房东服务费后的款项,在客人入住 24 小时后到账。AirCover 为房东提供高达 300 万美元的房产损坏保护。「超赞房东」计划用徽章 + 搜索权重加成奖励持续高质量的房东。
